programme.desc: In this episode it's not just a rice dish, Bren puts her spin on paella that's hearty and delicious. She makes a black rice seafood, mushroom paella and serves it along with a very fruity sangria.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Stacy and the family want the ultimate family room. Jake builds a large chalkboard while Jazz finds jumbo games that double as decorations. For the reveal, Jake makes Caribbean & Mexican Chicken Enchiladas. Jazz bakes off Chunky Monster Cookies.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Jake and Jazz merge fashion and function for Aria and her impressive book collection. Jake makes a custom bookshelf, and Jazz brings in new lighting and accent pieces. On the menu is Jake's Fettucine with Crab Cake Bake and Jazz makes Kiwi Lime pie.

programme.title: All of Us
programme.desc: Robert's sister (Tisha Campbell-Martin) questions his living arrangements and restaurant partnership with Neesee.

programme.title: All of Us
programme.desc: After attempting to do things apart, Robert and Neesee re-evaluate their feelings for each other.
